answers.a: Electrical signals generated by the brain during motor activity
answers.b: Electrical signals produced by muscles during contraction
answers.c: Electrical signals produced by heart during blood pumping
answers.d: TMechanical vibrations produced by motor movement

questions.question: 2. The definition of blood pressure is

answers.a: The movement of blood inside the veins only
answers.b: The amount of oxygen present in the arterial blood
answers.c: Force of blood against arterial walls during pumping and relaxation of the heart.
answers.d: The number of times the heart beats in one minute
